title: Stand on Business
description: Crystal Pvp texture pack that personally helped me throughout 2024. Various tweaks were given to create more flair and personality.
body: This texture pack has various changes from the default texture pack including but not limited to items, particles, and more. A highlight of the texture pack is its FabricSkyBox skies in the overworld and end! Other small tweaks include small totem, small hands besides blocks/weapons/tools, lower shield, and others.
